name: toolate28--pop-obsidian
description: Plugin Orchestration Protocol (POP) for Obsidian integration. Use this skill when the user mentions "POP", "Obsidian plugin", "pipeline orchestration", "idea to publish", "websocket bridge", "plugin manifest", "Obsidian automation", "note-to-paper pipeline", "knowledge pipeline", or wants to orchestrate multi-step workflows through Obsidian. This skill implements the 5-phase JSON-RPC protocol over WebSocket for real-time plugin orchestration.
